title: FAMILY CARE - 211info
text: HARNEY DISTRICT HOSPITAL FAMILY CARE FAMILY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Family practice and community clinic. Services include prenatal care, well child checks, immunizations, and general medical care for all ages. Visiting health care providers also provide specialty care services. 559 W Washington Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 573-2074 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-2074 Financial Services (541) 573-8638 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts all insurance plans, including Medicare DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Services: Behavioral Learning Therapy Childhood Immunization Family and Community Medicine Nutrition Education Obstetrics/Gynecology Pain Management Prenatal Care Speech Therapy Vaccine Information Well Baby Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
